name: Blasting Stone (Major)
description:
Activate 1 Strike

When this pebble hits a creature or a hard surface, it explodes with a deafening bang. A blasting stone deals 4d4 sonic damage and 4 sonic splash damage, and each creature within 10 feet of the space in which the stone exploded must succeed at a saving throw with the listed DC or be until the end of its next turn. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.
